title: endiandra merrillii
intro: Endiandra merrillii, also known as the Philippine laurel or Mayana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is native to the Philippines and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections, thanks to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Endiandra merrillii include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
